coverageThreshold.description: Minimum rule/row coverage the scenario suite must achieve (0..1) for release (§6.2).

description:
A governed **`Harness`** — the DecisionModel's scenario suite + coverage gate, versioned with the
model and required for release (doc 03 §6). The decision-source model itself lives beside the
harness (`<id>.source.json`); the harness references it by `decisionModel` id
